definitions.text: At all times; throughout all time; since the beginning.
examples: Green has always been my favorite color. I’ve loved it for as long as I can remember.

definitions.text: Constantly during a certain period, or regularly at stated intervals (opposed to sometimes or occasionally).
examples: In this street, the shops always close during lunchtime.

definitions.text: if necessary, or if there is no better option; in any event.
examples: I thought I could always go back to work.

definitions.text: This term needs a definition. Please help out and add a definition, then remove the text {{rfdef}}.
